Portugal is going against Colombia today for the first place in group

polymarket gives a solid 50/50 on both for taking this spot

but still favors Ronaldo's team this match

and even with that, people are skeptical on Ronaldo's performance

they're doubting that he's able to score 5+ times this event

and even considering how strong Portugal's stack is, Ronaldo is the one who's leading it

if he doesn't show the game he showed vs. much weaker team (Uzbekistan)

Portugal's chances on getting far might get cooked

in any way, the game promises to be interesting, since both teams are kinda close

competition is always great, so let's hope Ronaldo gets back to it for the Golden Boot

rooting for Portugal here and Ronaldo showing a great game

Anthropic restored access to their Mythos 5 model

or did they?

Claude 5 became available for a subset of approved U.S. organizations

NOT public access, we're still waiting for it

and if June 2 paper that Trump signed is affecting this model (probably is)

then we most likely won't see it publicly accessible until mid-July 

per market's rules, we need the access to be restored "to at least one US partner or client whose access was previously rescinded"

even tho i believe that "access was previously rescinded" from everyone, and giving it to anyone should resolve to "yes"

rules need to get an answer to whether those orgs really were the customers and got their access rescinded

the market is pretty sure we'll get a positive outcome here

with the odds being in ~90c range

but the volume here is meh, so it might easily flip

the rules are strict, so we probably got not enough for the resolution 

anyway, the way Trump stopped U.S. AI development is hilarious

regulating AI is a great idea, but the execution lacks imo

nfa dyor

RT @bckfv_eth: polymarket user put $2.2M on France to beat Norway today 

if Mbappe and co get the win, this trader will walk away with mor…

there will be no AI releases by Google and OpenAI this month

and probably the first half of July

Trump signed an executive order to give the federal government a 30-day window to review and test the models before they are released

while it is explicitly voluntary, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, and Anthropic have already agreed to participate

so the "voluntary" part is kinda questionable tbh

with that, GPT 5.6 and Gemini 3.5 Pro are not coming this month

and yet the market still gives it a chance

while OpenAI is technically sitting fully baked in the Codex routing logs

and they appear to be silently rolling out the model anyway (developers on Codex have reported massive jumps in capabilities for 5.5)

Google got problems - they felt like 3.5 Pro is not good enough and that it was burning through context tokens at an astronomical rate

Business Insider confirmed that Google explicitly pushed the general availability target for Gemini 3.5 Pro from late June into mid-July

it's just not happening for Google this month imo

the ones who're sitting on "release by June 30" side entered way earlier

and now just praying and giving others a bond

nfa dyor

Argentina is now one of the main favorites to win World Cup 2026

$3B market is pricing them right behind France

top 5 favorites are now worth 67c combined, leaving Germany, Netherlands, Brazil and other big countries behind

Spain and England lost quite a bit after drawing their games against Cabo Verde and Ghana respectively 

while Argentina is showing an amazing result, closing their group with no problems at all

if they're not losing their game against Jordan ofc

but anyways, they're already a guaranteed first place holders

France (2-0) got a different story here, they're gonna play against Norway (2-0) on Friday and winner do gets to be the first

the volume for the event is at another level tho

surpassing $3B at group stage is crazy, we might see it become the biggest ever before the main stage even starts

the current record is $3.7B for 2024 election market and we got almost a month to beat it

- Polymarket US: $100M…

it's still the most profitable and one of the most consistent bots out there

and surely one of the most active during WC, predicting everything on everyone

results, spreads, teams to score - $2.6M in active positions

less than a million of profit before it overtakes the only active trader in top 3

and all of that in less than a year...

profile link is below

Keir Starmer is about to announce his departure as UK Prime Minister

the announcement is projected to take place next week

major outlets are now discussing not "could there be a challenge?", but "what does the transition look like?"

and a lot of them are waiting for a departure timetable as early as Monday

per reports, Labour's MPs have told him he must set this timetable

and one of the main reasons for that is Andy Burnham

many MPs are already lining up behind the new leader, with some even discussing a near-uncontested transition rather than a long leadership battle

Starmer said he's not going anywhere, but the pressure became unbearable 

and the lack of a clear alternative leader is non-existent by now

the $35M market is certain of Keir's fate

nfa dyor

$8,928,561 in all-time profit from 2 games

- $2,100,000 of profit from Canada game

he's taking one game at a time it seems

interesting to see what game he picks today

Netherlands/Sweden looks like the one imo

$9M looks like a fine amount and enough to stop tho

profile below

this polymarket trading bot finally surpassed $10M of all-time profit

it's $1M away from getting #1 active trader spot on the whole platform

and with that, it's also $1M away from making a bot the best trader on the whole platform

there's also a third milestone - $1,000,000,000 of volume, a figure that no one has ever reached before

World Cup 2026 will probably make these happen, since it prints mainly on it atm

it got $2M in active positions on WC

the main strategy is entering and exiting at the right time with an insane speed

profile: https://t.co/ZlSYesKkz1

126,000 predictions and still going, truly the most legendary bot out there

Fable is not coming back soon - the odds for it dropped dramatically

June 22 odds dropped from 65% to ~10%

and July 1 had 85% and now hovering over 40%

why?

there were no announcements, any statements or any leaks since a long time

and that's exactly the reason why

Anthropic promised to make a statement within 24 hours on June 12, but we got silence

Lutnick's letter is still in power, claiming Fable 5 as national security threat

there was also a post from BridgeMind on June 16 claiming Fable 5 would be "restored within 48 hours"

48 hours almost passed and nothing got restored yet

@Polymarket might wanna add even more ranges to the market, since we're not dealing with it until July 1

or U.S. finally gets that Claude is the only model that is able to compete with Chinese giants atm

and that block might hurt national security a lot more, than model's jailbreak (which exists in any model - not just Anthropic's)

this World Cup will never be the same after yesterday’s results 

Spain is no longer the main favorite and doubt appears in every match-up from now on

4 games - 4 draws

that’s how day 5 of World Cup 2026 concluded

results:
- Group H: Spain 0-0 Cape Verde
- Group G: Belgium 1-1 Egypt
- Group H: Saudi Arabia 1-1 Uruguay
- Group G: Iran 2-2 New Zealand

and the first game made Spain lose its main favorite position

3-4% drop might sound little, but the volume already exceeded $2.4B

and that is what makes this drop so massive

also, people started doubting a lot about either sides winning
 
and it’s already priced in for Day 6 via draw odds

we’re only at group stage and it's already so chaotic

U.S. and Iran are going to sign a permanent peace deal this Friday

comes from both Trump and Iran's deputy FM Kazem Gharibabadi

the market is resolved to "Yes", while still sitting at around 90c

a lot of people can't agree with the resolution, since signing of MoU is coming later

and that they were talking about 60-day ceasefire rather than permanent peace

which was already achieved, military operations are over

60 day is a window to resolve other problems (nuclear, Hormuz fees, sanctions etc)

rules clearly state: "Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established"

so it does "constitute a definitive announcement that a qualifying agreement has been reached"

and some guy is so sure that he keeps his position active while it's already got him $1M in profit

just doesn't want to skip those 10c and sell early

cause he knows that when clarification comes, it's gonna get up to 100c in seconds

profile: https://t.co/6NHIzclmJS

there's still time for trump to say something stupid tho

Fable 5 being blocked is just a continuation of U.S. administration vs Anthropic war

earlier this year, Department of Defense declared Anthropic a "supply chain risk"

and newest model got down for a similar reason

"highly credible trusted partner" of both Anthropic and the government found a jailbreak in Fable's guardrails

which could make Fable a "cyber weapon", comes from White House AI advisor David Sacks

Anthropic responded that it’s "a narrow potential jailbreak" which exists in models like GPT-5.5 too

as of now, the dispute between the DOD and Anthropic is ongoing, and the new dispute will also continue for some time

it's either a few days to solve or a few months

and there's no in-between imo

also, Anthropic's global refund program (based on user reports) has been read by many as a quiet signal the model won't be back soon

what a hit before the rumored IPO...

nfa dyor

he made over $4M on NBA, UFC and EPL in 2 months

$1.5M made this month alone

and now entered WC2026 markets

- $265k on Canada to win -> $500k
- $235k on United States to win -> $500k

profile: https://t.co/R6UQjVpWMF

he has not picked overall winner yet and just going through the event match by match

which is a way to trade it imo

real-world situation can change from match to match and you cannot predict it beforehand

this daily market resolves "Yes" 97.5% of the time

every single day it ends with "Yes", but June 7th where Trump was polite fsr

not offline or quiet, just polite

other than that, Trump insulted someone every single day for 40 days straight

that's already like a daily ritual for him to mock some person

the chances of it happening are sitting at ~93% each day

no one even doubts he's doing it again

peacemaker, insultmaker, Allahpraiser and a great dancer

Claude 5 is set to be released today - just 12 days later after Opus 4.8

big money entered on Mythos/Claude 5 releasing this month following the leak from Alex Heath

he reported that Anthropic plans to release Claude 5 on June 9

Alex Heath is about as Tier 1 as it gets for Silicon Valley scoops and it already priced in @Polymarket odds

if it doesn't drop by midnight, it's usually due to a last-minute technical hitch on Anthropic's end, not bad reporting

and with such credibility the odds are still hovering around 80-85% for June 12 release

but huge step before the IPO is more than likely to be released today

and per leaks, it should behave less like a chatbot trying to answer a prompt, and more like an independent agent capable of executing a huge project end-to-end

leaks are still leaks, no matter how reliable they are, so keep that in mind

and such credible guy like Alex might get it wrong sometime too

hopefully they won't focus on "oversecurity and safety" as much as they did with Opus 4.8

there's a 95% chance of Elon Musk becoming first ever trillionaire

and most likely, it happens this week

the time has passed so fast that SpaceX’ IPO is just around the corner

Friday, June 12 is the day of the biggest IPO ever (most likely)

and we got all the numbers before it happens:
-> IPO price: $135/share
-> valuation: ~$1.75T
-> capital raised: about $75 billion
-> exchange: Nasdaq
-> ticker: SPCX

if it really goes as planned, or even a little below that, Musk is almost guaranteed to achieve that $1T mark

@Polymarket gives 67% for SpaceX's market cap to hit >$2T and almost a guarantee for >1.4T

combining so beloved AI and space company together is a great move imo

and that would bring the numbers sooo high, even tho i still believe that $2T is mispriced hype error

it might get there first, but fall down later

$1.5T feels about right and should be enough for Musk to become a trillionaire, even tho tightly
